title: mentha longifolia var. discolor
intro: Mentha longifolia var. discolor, also known as Woolly Mint or Horse Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Mentha longifolia var. discolor include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and headaches, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate menstrual cramps. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, and it can also be used as a natural remedy in aromatherapy.
